mapper.select: select * from main_banner_img WHERE is_valid is TRUE ORDER BY ord
select * from wj_histories ORDER BY hist_year desc, hist_month desc, hist_day_from
SELECT * FROM main_banner_img ORDER BY ord
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO main_banner_img (url, is_valid, ord) VALUES (#{url}, true, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(b.ord), 0) + 1 FROM main_banner_img b))
mapper.update: UPDATE main_banner_img SET ord = #{ord} WHERE idx = #{idx}
UPDATE main_banner_img SET is_valid = NOT is_valid WHERE idx = #{idx}
